# WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.TTLSConfiguration.InnerAuthentication.eap

**Case**

The value that represents the Extensible Authentication Protocol (EAP).

## Declaration

```swift
case eap
```

## Authentication types

- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.TTLSConfiguration.InnerAuthentication.chap**: The value that represents the Challenge-Handshake Authentication Protocol (CHAP).
- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.TTLSConfiguration.InnerAuthentication.mschap**: The value that represents the Microsoft Challenge Handshake Authentication Protocol (MSCHAP).
- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.TTLSConfiguration.InnerAuthentication.mschapV2**: The value that represents the Microsoft Challenge Handshake Authentication Protocol version 2 (MSCHAPV2).
- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.TTLSConfiguration.InnerAuthentication.pap**: The value that represents the Password Authentication Protocol (PAP).
